creator: mrrrrrrr@gmail.com
text:
The kdenetwork4 (and 3 I'm assuming) ports fail to compile due to the replacement of if_ppp by ppp.

Ports updated from CVS. Deleted old & old libs.

kdenetwork4/kppp and dependent fail to compile. That's all.

Fix: 

Update headers to the newer ppp, else compat?
How-To-Repeat: Stay -CURRENT ? ;)

(and make delete-old && make delete-old-libs)
